nasb.text: Or for a ram you shall prepare as a grain offering two-tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with one-third of a hin of oil;

esv.text: Or for a ram, you shall offer for a grain offering two tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with a third of a hin of oil.

cnv.text: 或是為每隻公綿羊，你要一同獻上兩公斤細麵，用一公升半油調和作素祭；

ccb.text: 每献一只公绵羊，要同时将两公斤细面粉调上一点二升油作素祭献上，
